div.h3: Per-VPN Swap Tracking Structure (Intel-Manual Quality Spec)

text.tspan: * Represents the swap metadata for a single virtual page.
* Packed to 8 bytes for cache efficiency and VPN indexing.

g.text: int32_t swap_slot; /* 0:4 - Index into backing storage */

text.tspan: /* Static Assertion: Validate structure layout for Intel x86_64 */
* Represents the swap metadata for a single virtual page.
* Packed to 8 bytes for cache efficiency and VPN indexing.
/* Static Assertion: Validate structure layout for Intel x86_64 */

g.text: swap_slot (4B): Primary index into global swap_space. Required for disk sector calculation.
in_swap (1B): Atomic flag. If true, MMU must trigger Page Fault for disk fetching.
_padding (3B): Ensures the next struct in an array is 8-byte (64-bit) aligned.
